title: Byju's International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Byju's International Enterprises is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Byju's International Enterprises has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Byju's International Enterprises:
Byju's International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's International Enterprises!
